title: xsd:date handling error
description:
In 57052e5
Query:
construct {<a> <b> ?d}
where {
?s ?p ?o
bind (xsd:date("2012-12-31") as ?d)
}
limit 1
returns:
@prefix xsd:  .
<a>   <b>   "2012-12-30+02:00"^^xsd:date .
which is

not xsd:date
wrong date
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_date TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2012-12-31 00:00:00+02:00');
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (2, NULL);
SELECT id, event_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, event_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < TIMESTAMP '2013-01-01 00:00:00+00:00';
key_bug_features: Incorrect handling of xsd:date with timezone offsets
